verses.text: Hihte pen Solomon' paunakte ahi hi: Ta pil in a pa lungdamsak a, ta hai in a nu dahsak hi
Thuman loin ngahna-ah phattuamna omlo a, thumanna in sihna ding pan hong hon hi
Topa in mihoihte a gilkialin koihlo a, migilote a duh uh nesaklo hi
Thadahna in zawn'na hi a, thanuamna in hauhna hi
A hunin an a lapa mipil hi a, anlak hunin a ihmupa in maizumna a ngah hi
Mihoihte in thupha ngah a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen hi
Mihoihte kiphawkphawk a, migilote kimangngilh pah hi
Mipilte in thuhilhna mang a, a hai paute in lungkhamna tuak hi
Thuman mite lungnuamin om hithiat a, thumanlote kiman hi
Khialhna kimuhmawh bawlna in buaina piangsak a, hang takin hilh ngamna in nopna piangsak hi
Mihoihte' kampaute pen nuntakna tuinak bang a, migilote in thusia bekbek gen uh hi
Muhdahna in kitotna piangsak a, itna in mawhna khempeuh maisak hi
Thungaihsun theite' kamsungah pilna om a, mihaite' nungzangah ciangduai kinga hi
Mipilte in a pilna uh behlapin, mihaite a pau ciangin thusia tawh kizom pahpah hi
Hauhna in mihaute hu a, zawn'na in mizawngte siasak hi
Mihoihte' thaman nuntakna hi a, migilote' thaman siatna ahi hi
Kihilhna man'na nuntak lampi zuihna hi a, hilhna man' noplohna lampi lauhuai zuihna ahi hi
Mi a mudahte bek in zuauthu gen a, mi a gensiate mihai ahi hi
Kam tam paute tampi khial a, pau iptheite mipil hi
Mihoihte' thugente nguntang bang a, migilote' ngaihsutnate in bangmah manlo hi
Mihoihte' thugente in mi tampi nuamtuamsak a, mihaite in a hai sihpih uh hi
Topa' thupha in mite hausak a, dahna leh gimna tawh piakhawm lo hi
Mihaite in gamtatsiat ding nuamsa uh a, thungaihsun theite in pil gamtatna nuamsa uh hi
Migilote tungah a kihtaktak uh tung a, mihoihte in a deihdeih uh ngah uh hi
Huihpi a nun' ciangin migilote leen'mang a, thuman mite lungmuangin om tawntung uh hi
Leenggahtui thuk in ha kimsak a, meikhu in mit a siipsak bangin, mi thadah in a cialpa a nasak hi
Topa zahtakna in khan' sausak a, migilote khan'sih hi
Mihoihte' lametna lungdamna hi a, migilote' lametna a hawmpi ahi hi
Topa in midikte hu a, migilote a susia hi
Midikte lungmuang takin om tawntung ding uh a, migilote in omna ding mun ngah zolo ding uh hi
Midikte in pilna thu gen uh a, thu hoihlo a gente' leii ki-attan ding hi
Midikte in a gen ding uh thuhoih thei a, migilote in thusia bekbek gengen uh hi.
